linkers.name: (G4S)×1
linkers.description: Minimal flexible linker. May be insufficient for independent domain folding.

linkers.name: (G4S)×2
linkers.description: Short flexible linker. Good balance of flexibility and compactness.

linkers.name: (G4S)×3
linkers.description: Standard flexible linker widely used in scFv and fusion proteins.

linkers.name: (G4S)×4
linkers.description: Long flexible linker. Ensures complete domain independence.
recommended_for: When steric clash is a concern
not_recommended_for: Compact constructs where rigidity is desired

linkers.name: (EAAAK)×1
linkers.description: Rigid α-helical linker. Maintains spatial separation between domains.
not_recommended_for: When flexibility is needed for binding

linkers.name: (EAAAK)×2
linkers.description: Medium rigid linker with stable helical structure.

linkers.name: (EAAAK)×3
linkers.description: Long rigid linker forming continuous α-helix.

linkers.name: XTEN-16
linkers.description: Unstructured, hydrophilic linker. Resists proteolysis and aggregation. Extended PK.

linkers.name: Proline-rich linker
linkers.description: Semi-rigid linker with PPII helix. Good protease resistance.
